mapper.select: SELECT cm.USER_ID AS SBMT_USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, s.SBMT_SN, s.ASGMT_SN, s.SBMT_CN, s.ATCH_FILE_ID, s.SCORE, s.GRDD_YN, s.GRDD_USER_ID, s.GRDD_DT, s.SBMT_DT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s ON s.ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn} AND s.SBMT_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ORDER BY cm.REG_DT ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s INNER JOIN ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab ON ab.ASGMT_SN = s.ASGMT_SN WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND s.GRDD_YN = 'N'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.SBMT_SN, s.ASGMT_SN, s.SBMT_USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, s.SCORE, s.GRDD_YN, s.GRDD_USER_ID, s.SBMT_DT, ab.ASGMT_SJ FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s JOIN ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab ON ab.ASGMT_SN = s.ASGMT_SN JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = s.SBMT_USER_ID WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ORDER BY s.SBMT_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT ( ASGMT_SN, SBMT_USER_ID, SBMT_CN, GRDD_YN, SBMT_DT, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{asgmtSn}, #{sbmtUserId}, #{sbmtCn}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT SET SBMT_CN = #{sbmtCn}, GRDD_YN = 'N', SCORE = NULL, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn} AND SBMT_USER_ID = #{userId}

UPDATE ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT SET SCORE = #{score}, GRDD_YN = 'Y', GRDD_USER_ID = #{grddUserId}, GRDD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SBMT_SN = #{sbmtSn} AND ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn}
